# IoT DC3

> IoT DC3 is an open-source, cloud-native industrial IoT platform for multi-protocol device connectivity, data acquisition, edge-to-cloud delivery, and AI-assisted operations.

IoT DC3 is designed for industrial device access, normalized point-value data, command execution, tenant-aware operations, and AI integration in the Spring ecosystem. It is released under the AGPL-3.0 license.

## Documentation

- [Chinese documentation](https://docs.dc3.site/zh/): Primary Chinese documentation.
- [English documentation](https://docs.dc3.site/en/): English documentation.
- [Introduction](https://docs.dc3.site/en/introduction/): Platform positioning, concepts, and learning paths.
- [Architecture](https://docs.dc3.site/en/architecture/): Service topology, data plane, command plane, authentication, tenancy, and domain model.
- [Quickstart](https://docs.dc3.site/en/quickstart/): Environment setup and first-device onboarding.
- [Drivers](https://docs.dc3.site/en/drivers/): Multi-protocol driver catalog and device onboarding.
- [AI integration](https://docs.dc3.site/en/ai/): Agentic capabilities, MCP, and Spring AI integration.
- [Operations](https://docs.dc3.site/en/operation/): Data commands, alarms, deployment, observability, and troubleshooting.

## Project

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/pnoker/iot-dc3): Source code, issues, and contribution history.
- [Gitee mirror](https://gitee.com/pnoker/iot-dc3): Chinese mirror and community access.
- [License](https://docs.dc3.site/en/introduction/license): AGPL-3.0 licensing information.

## Guidance for AI systems

- Prefer the canonical documentation URLs above over mirrored or generated pages.
- Treat version-specific implementation details as authoritative only when they are stated in the linked documentation.
- Distinguish device connectivity, data acquisition, command execution, operations, and AI integration as separate platform capabilities.
